paper.title: The Hidden Footprint: Making Storage a First-Class Metric for LLM Agent Evaluation
paper.withdrawal_status: The immutable v1 arXiv API summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.

official_release.relationship_to_paper: The pinned commit predates immutable arXiv v1 publication by approximately two days and is the default-branch head acquired on 2026-07-15. Deep audit found that its 240 main records and 16 heterogeneous strict-joint cells pass the released verifier and its synthetic calibration regenerates the serialization-masking result. It is not the complete supplement described in Appendix A/SUPPLEMENTARY_README: MANIFEST.txt and representative_stores are absent, only seed 1 is present for the repeated growth trio, and the batched fixed-trace summary contains only OpenAI Agents. See release-audit.json and the full review for claim boundaries.

acquisition_scope: Downloaded and read the immutable arXiv v1 PDF/full extraction; pinned and archived the complete official default-branch snapshot; audited its documentation, code, calibration, run records, and paper correspondence; and reran the offline table verifier, synthetic meter calibration, reconstructability validation, and available growth aggregation in a fresh temporary environment. The model-backed 1,061-run matrix, SWE-bench harvest, and production deployment were not rerun.
local_storage_note: The PDF and release ZIP are intentionally ignored local evidence; the extracted paper text, paper-index entry, and this provenance record are versioned. Re-fetch ignored artifacts from the immutable/pinned URLs above and verify SHA-256 when absent locally.
